name: 16p11_2_TBC1D10B_SD
description: 16p11.2 internal SD cluster around TBC1D10B/CORO1A. Lies between BP4 and BP5 of the proximal 16p11.2 recurrent CNV; contributes to atypical/nested 16p11.2 deletion breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~30 kb SD modules at >98% identity within the BP4-BP5 core; share KIF22/SPN paralog content.
